scripts.analyze: npm run analyze:unused && npm run analyze:deps
scripts.test: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --allow-run --no-check --no-lock handlers/wave3-e2e.test.ts services/admin-request-validation.test.ts services/ai.test.ts services/api-key-crypto.test.ts services/app-contracts.test.ts services/app-manifest-generation.test.ts services/app-runtime-resources.test.ts services/auth-cookies.test.ts services/auth-rate-limit.test.ts services/auth-request-validation.test.ts services/auth-transport.test.ts services/byok-providers.test.ts services/chat-billing.test.ts services/context-resolver.test.ts services/constraints.test.ts services/cors.test.ts services/d1-metering.test.ts services/d1-test-fixtures.test.ts services/desktop-oauth-sessions.test.ts services/docgen.test.ts services/embed-bridge.test.ts services/embedding.test.ts services/enforcement-policies.test.ts services/envvars.test.ts services/execution-settlement.test.ts services/gpu/builder.test.ts services/gpu/runpod.test.ts services/gpu/status.test.ts services/inference-client.test.ts services/inference-options.test.ts services/inference-route.test.ts services/logging.test.ts services/marketplace-request-validation.test.ts services/mcp-function-names.test.ts services/model-validation.test.ts services/oauth-login.test.ts services/openrouter-keys.test.ts services/originality.test.ts services/page-share-session.test.ts services/parser.test.ts services/permission-name-telemetry.test.ts services/plan-gate.test.ts services/platform-alias-telemetry.test.ts services/platform-request-validation.test.ts services/public-apps.test.ts services/permission-cache.test.ts services/request-auth.test.ts services/runtime-ai.test.ts services/sensitive-route-rate-limit.test.ts services/session-revocation.test.ts services/tokens.test.ts services/trust.test.ts services/ul-test-inputs.test.ts services/user-app-settings.test.ts services/user-supabase-configs.test.ts runtime/sandbox.test.ts
scripts.test:full: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --allow-run --no-check --no-lock handlers/*.test.ts services/*.test.ts runtime/*.test.ts
scripts.test:gpu-live: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$(command -v deno 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' "$HOME/.deno/bin/deno")}; if ! command -v "$DENO_BIN" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Deno not found: $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" run --allow-net --allow-env services/gpu/smoke-test.ts
